'''Delanoth'''<ref name="Wizards" /> was a tiny<ref name="DoE">''[[Darth Bane: Dynasty of Evil]]''</ref> [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Prakith system/Legends|Prakith system]] of the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core's]]<ref name="Wizards" /> [[Sector 5/Legends|Sector 5]].<ref name="SOL" /> The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] occupied the fourth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Prak]] and had eight [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="Wizards" />

==Behind the scenes==
Delanoth was first mentioned in "[[Byss and the Deep Core]], Part 3: Prakith," the third entry in the [[Planet Hoppers]] ''[[Byss and the Deep Core]]'' article series, written by [[Rodney Thompson]] and published on [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[Wizards.com|website]] on [[April 21]], [[2005]].<ref name="Wizards" /> Delanoth first appeared in ''[[Darth Bane: Dynasty of Evil]]'', the final novel of the ''[[Star Wars: Darth Bane Trilogy]]'' written by [[Drew Karpyshyn]]<ref name="DoE" /> and published on [[December 8]], [[2009]].<ref name="SWBU">{{SWArchive|url=vault/books/news20090219.html|text=Book Update: ''Deathtroopers'' and Darth Bane}}</ref> The reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'',<ref name="TEA" /> published on [[August 18]], 2009,<ref name="YBY">''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, New Edition]]''</ref> placed the Prakith [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Delanoth, in grid square K-10.<ref name="TEA" />
